issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on the happy path.
The skill assumes Node.js 18+ and specific AI agents, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: single-agent-hud-setup
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers almost all rubric items, missing only the explicit use of calculateCost in the server logic, while Response B omits all required components.

scenarios.name: multi-agent-dashboard
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets the rubric, while Response A lacks ContextMonitor usage, gauge widgets, cost calculation, and WebSocket server.
